title: Software Update - DFU - Animations on Software Update screen
scenario: Software Update screen animations fail to slide in correctly during firmware update flow on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap on the connected headset to open Device Settings.
Observe the Software Update screen animation.
Observe the Three Easy Steps screen animation.
Observe the Software Update screen animation.
Navigate back to the Three Easy Steps screen.
expected: 1) Software Update screen slides in from the right. 2) Three Easy Steps screen slides in from the right. 3) Software Update screen slides in from the left. 4) Updating screen slides in from the right with an animated picture in the center.
